## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue (if any). List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] My changes compile and build without warnings or errors
- [ ] I have checked my code and verified no secrets, credentials, or API keys are checked in
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / README accordingly
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] The app's localized strings (strings.xml for en, es, fr) have been updated if new UI messages were added
